message:
Simplify provider adapter helpers

Remove the tiny handler wrapper helpers and pass plain handler
objects into buildProviderPlan instead.

Also move more provider output validation to Zod, share the common
API-key readiness check, and convert the stateless Exa, Parallel,
Valyu, and Custom adapters to plain objects.

This keeps the provider layer more direct and reduces class and
helper boilerplate without changing behavior.
